stage: Phase F2 — Control Plane & Autoscaler Implementation

compliance_entries.implementation: WorkerDrainer.terminate() checks state == RELEASE_LEASES before allowing TERMINATE; drain() executes phases in order

compliance_entries.description: Observability — all health events published to EventBus
compliance_entries.implementation: HealthSupervisor.publish_health_event() emits HealthEvent to runtime.health.* topics
compliance_entries.verification: HealthEvent published via ExecutionEvent on EventBus

compliance_entries.implementation: ControlPlaneState dataclass with active_workers, draining_workers, scaling_signal

compliance_entries.description: Guarded state transitions — scaling state machine
compliance_entries.implementation: Autoscaler.evaluate_load() 3 guards: cooldown, hysteresis, consecutive cycles
WorkerDrainer each phase guarded: cannot skip RELEASE_LEASES before TERMINATE
HealthSupervisor.trigger_eviction() checks degradation == CRITICAL and state not DRAINING/TERMINATED

compliance_entries.description: No global state — all components per-instance
compliance_entries.implementation: Autoscaler, HealthSupervisor, ReconciliationLoop, WorkerDrainer, ControlPlane all have instance state only

compliance_entries.description: Determinism — same load + policy → same signal
compliance_entries.implementation: Autoscaler.evaluate_load() is pure (no random, no side effects)
ReconciliationLoop.compare_desired() and compute_delta() are pure functions
scale_up reversed by scale_down; drain is irreversible per-worker but system-level reversibility via new worker provisioning
compliance_entries.verification: Corrections list includes both scale_up and scale_down/drain options

compliance_entries.implementation: HealthSupervisor.assess_degradation() allows MINOR/MAJOR → NONE; recovery published as worker.health.recovered
compliance_entries.verification: update_worker_health detects deg changes and publishes HealthEvent

compliance_entries.description: Terminal states — TERMINATE blocks further transitions
compliance_entries.implementation: WorkerDrainer.terminate() sets TERMINATE state; is_terminated() blocks re-drain; idempotent on re-call
drain_worker: already terminated → return success; trigger_eviction: already terminated → return receipt; mark_draining: already draining → True
WorkerDrainer with MARK_DRAINING → STOP_NEW_LEASES → AWAIT_COMPLETION → RELEASE_LEASES → TERMINATE

compliance_entries.verification: test_fluctuating_load_around_target_holds (PASS) — no oscillation under fluctuating load
Constants defined on class; interval strategy documented

compliance_entries.implementation: ControlPlane constructed only via CompositionRoot._build_control_plane(); all deps injected
